creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 237506
x11/cinnamon-session intial update to 5.4.0 (no xtrans in build)

cinnamon-session is now available in a release 5.4.0

The attached diff updates the port for this newer release. Additional changes:
- Updating meson args (no gconf option, disabling xtrans by default, not tested otherwise)
- Removing the docs option - no longer supported in upstream
- Adding an option for enabling verbose logging from cinnamon-session (enabled by default, for consistency with earlier port behaviors)

Candidly, I should probably reconsider the xtrans option. It could probably be enabled by default, with an additional dependency on x11/xtrans. At the time of the patch, it may have seemed more expedient to simply disable the feature.

This patch would correspond to a patch to be published shortly, for x11/cinnamon and other ports from linuxmint in updating to a 5.4 series release
